original_image_tags: Aged, tan or light-brown paper, likely the back of a document or a folder cover. It shows signs of wear, creasing along diagonal fold lines, and a small tear on the right edge. The surface has scattered dark spots and discoloration consistent with age.

elements.description: One brown paper envelope or backing with a torn right edge. Features one red stamped label at the bottom with the text '62-83891-153' and 'ENCLOSURE'.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the main visual element (a brown paper backing with a torn right edge), but Description B adds specific details about a red stamped label and text that Description A omits, without direct contradiction.
